desc: This is the STU 1 - Ballot version of the DeIdentification, Anonymization and Redaction Toolkit Services (DARTS) FHIR IG.
title: De-Identification, Anonymization and Redaction Toolkit Services (DARTS) FHIR IG
introduction: De-Identification, Anonymization and Redaction Toolkit Services (DARTS) FHIR IG defines a set of FHIR operations to de-identify and anonymize identifiable data so that non PII/PHI data can be exchanged.
